channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Why is there a political deadlock in Lebanon?
item.description: The Lebanese government wants Hezbollah to disarm as it aims for a state monopoly on weapons.

item.title: US says Iran can play at 2026 World Cup but bars those with ‘IRGC ties’
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the US has not told the Iranian national team that it cannot play.

item.title: The story Tehran wants you to read
item.description: A new narrative about Iran’s leadership mistakes continuity for change - and echoes the regime’s own preferred framing.

item.title: Ukrainian married couple aged 75 killed in Russian attack on Odesa
item.description: Ukrainian officials say residential buildings and bulk carrier also hit in overnight assault.

item.title: Trump’s May 1 deadline: Can he continue war on Iran after that?
item.description: Trump is obliged under the War Powers Act to limit the conflict after 60 days with congressional approval.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 56 after Trump extended ceasefire?
item.description: The Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is extended by three weeks after White House talks with Israeli and Lebanese envoys.

item.title: How fake AI victims are being used to provide rationale for attacking Iran
item.description: In the battle of propaganda, fake videos and images of female victims of Iran's government are going viral.

item.title: Oil rises above $106 per barrel as US, Iran deadlocked in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Jump in prices comes as Donald Trump says vessels will need permission of US Navy to transit key waterway.

item.title: Iran war live: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says time not on Tehran’s side
item.description: Death toll from Israel's ongoing genocidal war on Gaza has reached 72,568 with 172,338 wounded: Gaza's Health Ministry.

item.title: Funeral held for journalist killed in targeted Israeli strike
item.description: Mourners attended the funeral of Amal Khalil, a journalist who was killed in an Israeli attack in south Lebanon.
